title: Why Us?
content:
Why Us?

Üsküdar University Privileges

It is Türkiye's first behavioral and health sciences themed university.

It has campuses in central locations in Istanbul.

It emphasizes techno-entrepreneurship by combining technology and health.

It offers a strong university-hospital collaboration with NPISTANBUL Brain Hospital.

It is equipped with nearly 100 laboratories and 40 research and application centers.

It encourages project culture by contributing to the entrepreneurship ecosystem with the BrainPark Incubation Center.

Provides the opportunity to double major and minor.

It has more than 650 Erasmus agreements.

Thanks to the Blue Diploma application, it provides career advantages to its graduates worldwide.

It is the only Turkish university selected as a Center of Excellence by UNESCO TWAS.

It has a strong and experienced academic staff.

Adopts the principles of criticality, libertarianism, participation and pluralism.

It is the university with the highest number of departments in the Faculty of Health Sciences in Türkiye .

It adopts a multidisciplinary approach in education.

It offers programs that combine engineering and health sciences.

It provides innovative education and research opportunities that shape the professions of the future.

It supports its students with a wide range of scholarship opportunities and encourages academic success.

Enriches campus life with student clubs and social-cultural activities.

Pioneering practices in the field of "Positive Psychology" in Türkiye.

It makes a difference in the scientific world with its academic and clinical achievements in the field of "Neuropsychopharmacology".

It offers academic opportunities for students who want to specialize in the field of Sufi studies.

It provides a comfortable academic environment for its students with its comprehensive library and modern study areas.

It offers students a wide range of research opportunities through national and international collaborations.

Criticizability

Libertarianism

Pluralism

Participation

Why Thematic University?

The most important development of the 21st century has been the scientific activities of positive sciences and social sciences on a common ground. Under the title of behavioral sciences, it is a new scientific trend, especially in the USA, for the positive sciences "Seeking Truth" and the social sciences "Seeking Good, Beautiful and Right" to form a discipline together.

Academic structures that try to understand social events and human behavior, criminal and terrorist behavior are increasing.

Some Higher Education Institutions providing education on this subject:

The College of Social and Behavioral Sciences

www.sbs.arizona.edu

Institute of Behavioral Science (IBS)

www.colorado.edu/Ib

California Board of Behavioral Sciences

www.bbs.ca.gov

FBI Academy

www.fbi.gov
